blocks.text: A distribution channel is package artifact identity. The same daemon binary may expose different host surfaces when the channel changes.

items: GUI adapters convert provider path, login status, workspace grant, and consent state into C11 records.
GUI adapters do not spawn provider processes; execution stays behind the local helper and C4 runtime boundary.
Shared wire types move to `riido-contracts` only when two repositories need the same contract.
